representative.statement: lemma inner_endpoint_chord_nonpos_of_cospherical_angles {O e c n : N9Point} {r : ℝ} (_hr : 0 < r) (hc : dist c O = r) {α β γ : ℝ} (hαγ : α ≤ γ) (hγβ : γ ≤ β) (hβα : β - α ≤ Real.pi) (hen : inner ℝ (e - O) (n - O) = r ^ 2 * Real.cos (β - α)) (hce : inner ℝ (c - O) (e - O) = r ^ 2 * Real.cos (γ - α)) (hcn : inner ℝ (c - O) (n - O) = r ^ 2 * Real.cos (β - γ)) : inner ℝ (e - c) (n - c) ≤ 0
